Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('proyectos',[]\) print\(f'{len\(arr\)} proyectos'\) for p in arr[:5]: print\(f' {p.get\(\\"id_proyecto\\",\\"?\\"\)} | {\(p.get\(\\"nombre\\",\\"\\"\)||p.get\(\\"nombre_proyecto\\",\\"\\"\)\)[:40]} | {p.get\(\\"estado\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else \(d.get\('proyectos'\) or d.get\('data'\) or [d] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else []\) print\(f'{len\(arr\)} proyectos'\) for p in arr[:5]: pid=p.get\('id_proyecto','?'\) nm=\(p.get\('nombre'\) or p.get\('nombre_proyecto'\) or ''\)[:40] print\(f' {pid} | {nm} | {p.get\(\\"estado\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) " curl -s http://localhost:8088/build/sprints/PS-MN6IK6Y0)

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('sprints',[]\) print\(f'\\n{len\(arr\)} sprints for PS-MN6IK6Y0'\) if arr: print\('Keys:', sorted\(arr[0].keys\(\)\)\) s=arr[0] print\(f'Sprint {s.get\(\\"sprint_number\\"\)}: {s.get\(\\"nombre\\",\\"\\"\)} | estado:{s.get\(\\"estado\\"\)} | pts_plan:{s.get\(\\"story_points_planificados\\"\)} | pts_done:{s.get\(\\"story_points_completados\\"\)} | velocity:{s.get\(\\"velocity\\"\)}'\) bd=s.get\('burndown_data'\) print\(f'burndown_data type: {type\(bd\).__name__}, len: {len\(bd\) if bd else 0}'\) if bd and len\(bd\)>0: print\(f'burndown sample: {bd[:2]}'\) " curl -s 'http://localhost:8088/build/sprint-items/PS-MN6IK6Y0?sprint_number=1')

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('items',[]\) print\(f'\\n{len\(arr\)} items in sprint 1'\) if arr: print\('Keys:', sorted\(arr[0].keys\(\)\)\) print\(json.dumps\(arr[0], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:400]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('sprints',[]\) print\(f'{len\(arr\)} sprints'\) for s in arr[:3]: print\(f' S{s[\\"sprint_number\\"]}: {s[\\"estado\\"]} | plan:{s.get\(\\"story_points_planificados\\",0\)} done:{s.get\(\\"story_points_completados\\",0\)}'\) " echo "=== Sprint Items ===")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('items',[]\) print\(f'{len\(arr\)} items'\) for i in arr: print\(f' {i[\\"item_key\\"]} | {i[\\"tipo\\"]} | {i[\\"estado\\"]} | {i[\\"silo\\"]} | pts:{i.get\(\\"story_points\\",0\)} | {i[\\"titulo\\"][:40]}'\) " echo "=== Key functions ===")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); arr=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('sessions',[]\) for s in arr[:3]: pid=s.get\('id_proyecto'\) or s.get\('nombre_proyecto',''\) pd=s.get\('pipeline_data',{}\) keys=list\(pd.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(pd,dict\) else [] print\(f'{s.get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\)[:20]} | proj:{pid[:20]} | keys:{keys[:8]}'\) if 'planResult' in pd or 'plan' in pd: plan=pd.get\('planResult'\) or pd.get\('plan',{}\) if isinstance\(plan,dict\): print\(f' plan keys: {list\(plan.keys\(\)\)[:10]}'\) ")

Bash(cd /root/cognitive-pmo echo "── grep consumidores /incidencias/live \(backend + frontend\) ──" grep -rn "/incidencias/live\\|incidencias_live" backend/)

Bash(cd /root/cognitive-pmo echo "── F4.0.a existencia ──" PGPASSWORD=REDACTED-old-password psql -h postgres -U jose_admin -d cognitive_pmo -c " SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN \('run_incident_plans','itsm_form_drafts'\);" echo echo "── F4.0.b schema ──" PGPASSWORD=REDACTED-old-password psql -h postgres -U jose_admin -d cognitive_pmo -c "\\d run_incident_plans" echo echo "── F4.0.c contenido ──" PGPASSWORD=REDACTED-old-password psql -h postgres -U jose_admin -d cognitive_pmo -c " SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM run_incident_plans; SELECT id, ticket_id, nombre, prioridad, area, sla_horas, created_at FROM run_incident_plans ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;" echo echo "── F4.0.d FKs entrantes ──" PGPASSWORD=REDACTED-old-password psql -h postgres -U jose_admin -d cognitive_pmo -c " SELECT tc.table_name AS tabla_origen, kcu.column_name AS col_origen, tc.constraint_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu USING \(constraint_name, table_schema\) JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu USING \(constraint_name, table_schema\) WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND ccu.table_name = 'run_incident_plans';" echo echo "── F4.0.e FKs salientes ──" PGPASSWORD=REDACTED-old-password psql -h postgres -U jose_admin -d cognitive_pmo -c " SELECT kcu.column_name AS col_origen, ccu.table_name AS tabla_destino, ccu.column_name AS col_destino, tc.constraint_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu USING \(constraint_name, table_schema\) JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu USING \(constraint_name, table_schema\) WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND tc.table_name = 'run_incident_plans';" echo echo "── F4.0.f consumidores en código ──" grep -rn "run_incident_plans" backend/ frontend/ database/)

Bash(cd /root/cognitive-pmo echo "── grep run_incident_plans / itsm_form_drafts en main.py ──" grep -n "run_incident_plans\\|itsm_form_drafts" backend/main.py echo echo "── grep en TODO backend/ ──" grep -rn "run_incident_plans\\|itsm_form_drafts" backend/)

Bash(docker-compose --version echo -e "\\n=== TODOS LOS CONTAINERS \(activos + parados\) ===" docker ps -a --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}" echo -e "\\n=== IMÁGENES ===" docker images --format "table {{.Repository}}\\t{{.Tag}}\\t{{.Size}}\\t{{.CreatedSince}}" echo -e "\\n=== VOLÚMENES ===" docker volume ls echo -e "\\n=== REDES DOCKER ===" docker network ls)
Bash(echo "=== ESPACIO DISCO ===" df -h echo -e "\\n=== MAYORES DIRECTORIOS EN /root ===" du -sh /root/*/)
